title: Governed Live-DSN Hold Proof And Host Graceful Degrade
objective: Recover a governed live DSN for the hold-boundary cadence surface, produce a real deferred-view hold or reopen verdict where the current posture allows it, and keep the host mirror truthful when it lacks a live-query engine.
dependency_note: Packet 057 closed host portability for the default cadence surface, but a real hold-or-reopen verdict still required recovering a governed live DSN and then handling the asymmetric workstation-vs-host query capabilities truthfully.
execution_steps: Read the governed Supabase credentials source and recover a bounded live DSN without publishing secrets into repo-visible files.
Add an explicit direct-connection path to the deferred-view helper so a supplied live DSN can produce an authoritative verdict where the current posture supports it.
Rerun the hold-boundary cadence wrapper locally against the live Supabase session-pooler DSN and capture the resulting hold or reopen decision.
Probe the authoritative host mirror with the same live DSN, then harden the Bash wrapper so host postures without a live-query engine degrade truthfully instead of failing.
constraints: Do not reveal secrets in packet text, terminal summaries, or tracked files.
Do not widen AI-services admission or install new host packages.
Do not treat a successful live-DSN rerun as authority to reopen the deferred Operations Visibility seams unless the counts are actually non-zero.

local_live_dsn_wrapper_result.decision: Deferred Operations Visibility seams remain empty and should stay on hold.

host_live_dsn_wrapper_result.decision: Authoritative deferred view counts require apex-db to run against a live DSN such as SEAM_DATABASE_URL; the current database surface is not sufficient for this hold check.

host_live_query_engine_gaps: pg package not resolvable from the host repo mirror

execution_rationale: The cadence surface was still incomplete as a decision surface while it could only return generic UNAVAILABLE and not a real hold-or-reopen verdict from a governed live DSN.
Adding an explicit direct-connection path keeps the live verdict inside the current bounded operator surface without reopening broader product or AI scope.
The host mirror should stay truthful under live-DSN requests even when it cannot execute them locally; graceful degradation is preferable to a startup failure.
next_packet_candidate: Keep the deferred Operations Visibility seams on hold until live data changes, or open a separate bounded host-query-engine packet only if live DSN rechecks must also execute authoritatively from /home/olares/code/apex.
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-06 as the bounded follow-on to Packet 057. Packet 058 recovered a governed live Supabase DSN, added a direct-connection path to the deferred-view helper, reran the workstation wrapper to a real HOLD verdict with both deferred view counts at zero, and hardened the host Bash wrapper so live-DSN requests degrade truthfully back to UNAVAILABLE instead of failing when the host mirror lacks a runnable live-query engine.
next_action: Do not reopen `v_resource_allocation` or `v_equipment_needs` consumers until a later live-data rerun returns non-zero counts, or open a separate bounded host-query-engine lane if authoritative host-side live-DSN reruns become necessary.
